_note: Phase-B attribution methods split into GRADIENT (differentiable soft_ram_peek + Zygote + bilinear sampler position path) and PERTURBATION/BLACK-BOX (intervene_ram!/intervene_tia! + bit-exact ROM re-run, read screen delta). Every path+line verified against the file. jaxtari_note is the JAX-equivalent differentiable path (gradient methods) or null (perturbation methods). Shared oracle for all: run_intervention (Delta_y) in ground_truth/oracle_intervene.jl:242.

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed (seeded random-action prefix, oracle cause-density gate, position cell + sampler geom)
drive one game: build causes, pick content byte, score content headline + position contrast

computation.desc: CONTENT output = forward-exact one-hot RAM read; its Zygote gradient is the content-path dy/du (Theorem 1)
vanilla saliency |dy/du| over the 128-byte RAM tape
autodiff yielding the attribution (the surrogate backward of Theorem 1)
POSITION path: bilinear (triangular-kernel) sampler read whose column is an affine fn of RAM byte pidx via soft_ram_peek — restores the non-vanishing position gradient
computation.note: bound to sampler_read at shared_testbed_impl.jl:174; naive position_read is identically zero (vanishing baseline)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set the cause, re-run the bit-exact ROM, read y; F = correlation(|dy/du|, |Delta_y|). Invoked via oracle_abs_delta (saliency.jl:301)

saliency.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed
drive one game (content headline + position contrast)

computation.desc: CONTENT output = forward-exact one-hot RAM read
SmoothGrad: average |dy/du| over n_samples Gaussian-perturbed RAM copies (sigma noise)
autodiff on each noisy sample x + sigma*randn
clean (noise-free) reference gradient for the vanilla-vs-smooth contrast
POSITION path: bilinear sampler read restoring the non-vanishing position gradient

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(SmoothGrad, |Delta_y|)

smoothgrad.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: CONTENT output y = one-hot RAM read at score cell (forward-exact, Theorem 1)
dy/du over the 128-byte RAM tape (one-hot content gradient e_s)
autodiff of the content read
attribution maps: GradxInput u*dy/du, DeepLIFT (u-baseline)*dy/du (completeness-exact on the linear content unit), saliency |dy/du|
POSITION/pixel output is a discrete argmax of sprite column => differentiable RAM handle identically zero (vanishing gradient, modeled honestly)
POSITION path restored via bilinear sampler (shared testbed)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(GradxInput, |Delta_y|)

gradxinput.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: CONTENT output = forward-exact one-hot RAM read; a LINEAR unit (dy/du = e_idx >= 0)
Guided Backprop: gradient then keep positive part (guided_rule) => |positive part|; returns (guided, vanilla)
autodiff yielding the raw gradient the guided rule rectifies
POSITION path restored via bilinear sampler (shared testbed)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(guided saliency, |Delta_y|)

guided_backprop.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: CONTENT output IG integrates = forward-exact one-hot RAM read
build the IG baseline x0 (zeros / mean_ram / random / real_alt) for the baseline sweep
Integrated Gradients: Riemann sum of dy/du over the straight-line path x0->x, times (x-x0)
autodiff at each interpolation point x_alpha
POSITION path restored via bilinear sampler (shared testbed)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(IG, |Delta_y|)

ig_baseline_sweep.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS
shared gameplay-state testbed
delegates to ig_baseline_sweep.jl (included) for the shared scorer + content read

computation.desc: CONTENT output EG integrates = forward-exact one-hot RAM read (via ig_baseline_sweep)
EG background reference pool D drawn from the seeded gameplay stream (each row = RAM tape at a prefix frame, so the causal byte varies)
Expected Gradients: Monte-Carlo over (baseline m ~ D, alpha ~ U(0,1)); accumulate (x-x0)*dy/dx at interpolated x_alpha
autodiff at each MC interpolation point x_alpha
POSITION path restored via bilinear sampler (the redesign keystone)

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(EG, |Delta_y|)

expected_gradients.jaxtari_note: JAX-equivalent differentiable path (bit-exact per Theorem 1, for GPU batching): jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py, soft_mem.py, straight_through.py

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (the masked re-runs step the horizon here)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: occlusion attribution: for each cause, occlude to baseline, step the horizon, read the |screen/output delta| vs intact
the intervention operator: set the masked cause to its baseline (RAM cell / TIA reg -> 0, joystick -> NOOP)
snapshot the RAM+screen (byte-exact) after the re-run to read the output

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(occlusion attr, |Delta_y|)

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (masked re-runs step the horizon)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: value of a masked coalition: occlude every masked cause (do-intervention), step the horizon, read |output delta| vs intact
the mask operator = the oracle's occlude! (RAM/TIA -> 0, joystick masked = NOOP)
extremal-perturbation search: grow the smallest mask that maximally shifts the output, then attribute per cause
snapshot RAM+screen after each masked re-run

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(extremal attr, |Delta_y|)

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (masked re-runs step the horizon)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: masked forward: drop (mask to 0) the not-kept cells via the oracle's occlude!, step the horizon, read y
draw N random Bernoulli(keep_prob) masks and collect the masked outputs
RISE importance: output-weighted mean mask (1/(N*p)) * sum_n y_n * m_n[i]
snapshot RAM+screen after each masked re-run

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(RISE importance, |Delta_y|)

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (masked re-runs step the horizon)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: masked forward: absent cells -> 0 via the oracle's occlude! (RAM->0), step the horizon, read y
draw the perturbation design matrix Z (Bernoulli present-mask, anchor row = all-present) and outputs
LIME locality kernel pi(z) = exp(-cosine_dist(z,1)^2 / sigma^2)
fit the weighted ridge linear surrogate; coefficients are the attributions
snapshot RAM+screen after each masked re-run

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(LIME coef, |Delta_y|)

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (coalition re-runs step the horizon)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: coalition value f(S): mask the absent cells to 0 via the oracle's occlude! (RAM->0), step the horizon, read y
sample coalitions with sizes from the Shapley-kernel weighting
solve the weighted least-squares KernelSHAP system for the Shapley values phi
snapshot RAM+screen after each coalition re-run

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(SHAP phi, |Delta_y|)

applied_on.desc: env reset + per-frame step of the bit-exact VCS (counterfactual re-runs step the horizon)
shared gameplay-state testbed

computation.desc: counterfactual re-run: substitute the chosen RAM cells to the alternative RAM values, step the horizon, read y
single-cell counterfactual effect per candidate cell (|y_cf - y_x|)
greedy search for the minimal counterfactual cell set that flips the output past tau
snapshot RAM+screen after each counterfactual re-run

oracle.desc: exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u): set cause, re-run ROM, read y; F = correlation(CF mass, |Delta_y|)
